idea-plugin.name: Sefin One Dark Theme
idea-plugin.description:
A polished One Dark-inspired theme for JetBrains IDEs, developed and maintained as an independent project.

The theme preserves the familiar One Dark feel while adding a refined color palette, improved interface readability, and a more consistent IDE appearance. Its darker, cooler palette works well during long coding sessions, especially on OLED and QD-OLED displays.

Available themes:

  • Sefin One Dark
  • Sefin One Dark Vivid
  • Sefin One Dark Islands
  • Sefin One Dark Vivid Islands

Recommended setup:

  1. Try Sefin One Dark Vivid Islands.
  2. Disable Smooth Scrolling.
  3. Enable Compact mode.
  4. Disable Settings | Editor | General | Appearance | Show hard wrap and visual guides.

After installation, select the theme in Settings | Appearance & Behavior | Appearance.
For Islands variants, enable Settings | Advanced Settings | Enable Islands UI for custom themes.
Visit the project repository to learn more.
